scripts.demo:gif: for f in e2e/demo/output/*.mp4; do ffmpeg -y -i "$f" -vf "fps=8,scale=720:-1:flags=lanczos" -loop 0 "${f%.mp4}.gif"; done
scripts.demo:mux: ffmpeg -y -hide_banner -loglevel error -i e2e/demo/output/01-hero-master-tour.mp4 -i e2e/demo/output/narration.wav -filter_complex "[1:a]silenceremove=start_periods=1:start_silence=0.05:start_threshold=-50dB,adelay=3000,apad[a]" -map 0:v -map "[a]" -c:v copy -c:a aac -b:a 192k -shortest e2e/demo/output/01-hero-master-tour-narrated.mp4 && cp e2e/demo/output/01-hero-master-tour-narrated.mp4 public/demo.mp4
